parents.subject: LU-15639 tests: fix facets_hosts() to get active hosts

commit.subject: LU-16415 tests: skip interop sanity-quota root project
commit.message:
LU-16415 tests: skip interop sanity-quota root project

Skip sanity-quota test_1j() that is testing for root project quota
enforcement when OST is below 2.15.63.108. Root project quota support
was added in commit v2_15_63-108-gbdf2744ad5, so older servers cannot
run this test.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/49936
Lustre-commit: 46b947e69d6b2d1ca1408295b929844e3052925f

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota serverbuildno=107 serverjob=lustre-b2_15
Fixes: f147655c33 ("LU-16415 quota: enforce project quota for root")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I4bbff94ad4057a47ced812d7ca4c537d773ebbe5
Whamcloud-bug-id: EX-6867
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61410
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
